Advanced Momentum Analyzer

OBV + Sortino + Slope Acceleration | 1385 assets | 2026-03-03  |  market-dashboards
Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-03 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Analyzes 700+ assets using OBV divergence detection, Sortino ratios, slope acceleration, and trajectory classification. Produces signals from STRONG_BUY to SELL with confidence scores. OBV divergence flags price-volume disagreements as early warning signals.
Today's Reading
Today's dashboard shows a heavily bearish tilt across the 700+ assets analyzed, with SELL signals nearly matching HOLD positions (400 vs 615) and only 279 STRONG_BUY ratings generated. The top ten buy opportunities are notably concentrated in a single pattern: all ten display V-shaped recoveries with either 90% or 75% confidence scores, suggesting a coordinated bounce in early-alphabet ticker symbols (AFK, ACMR, AES, ABBV, AG, AEIS, AEM, AGI, AEP, AIA). The scarcity of BUY signals (only 30 across the entire dataset) combined with substantial SELL volume indicates the market is in a risk-off environment with only narrow pockets of recovery momentum. This asymmetry between the 400 SELL ratings and the modest 309 bullish ratings (STRONG_BUY plus BUY) suggests caution is warranted despite the strong confidence scores on today's recovery candidates.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
MODERATE MOMENTUM
